titles.en: Chapter on Bequests for an Heir
Chapter on Bequests for an Heir

segments: 5443 - قَالَ مُصَنِّفُ هَذَا اَلْكِتَابِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ اَلْخَبَرُ اَلَّذِي رُوِيَ : "أَنَّهُ لاَ وَصِيَّةَ لِوَارِثٍ".
arabic.text: 5443 - قَالَ مُصَنِّفُ هَذَا اَلْكِتَابِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ اَلْخَبَرُ اَلَّذِي رُوِيَ : "أَنَّهُ لاَ وَصِيَّةَ لِوَارِثٍ".

segments: Hadith.5443 - The author of this book (may Allah (swt) have mercy on him) said that another narration states "There is no will for an heir".
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.5443 - The author of this book (may Allah (swt) have mercy on him) said that another narration states "There is no will for an heir".

titles.en: Chapter on Bequests for an Heir

segments: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُفَضِّلُ بَعْضَ وُلْدِهِ عَلَى بَعْضٍ قَالَ "نَعَمْ وَ نِسَاءَهُ".
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُفَضِّلُ بَعْضَ وُلْدِهِ عَلَى بَعْضٍ قَالَ "نَعَمْ وَ نِسَاءَهُ".

segments:
Hadith.5444 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Hajjal from Thaʿlabah ibn Maymun from Muhammad ibn Qays, who said: I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a man who gives preference to some of his children over others.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, and he may also favor some of his wives (over other wives)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5444 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Hajjal from Thaʿlabah ibn Maymun from Muhammad ibn Qays, who said: I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a man who gives preference to some of his children over others.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, and he may also favor some of his wives (over other wives)."

narratorChain.raw: 5444 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْحَجَّالِ عَنْ ثَعْلَبَةَ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ قَالَ
